subcodes.first_line: Upon thee, O Mahdi, be the remembrance of God and His glorification! Rejoice thou in that thy name hath been mentioned before the Throne time and again [3.5s]... ...Know thou that upon Our arrival at this Spot, We chose to designate it as the 'Most Great Prison.'  Though previously subjected in another land
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک یا مهدی ذکر الله و تکبیره ان افرح بما یذکر لدی العرش اسمک فی اکثر الاحیان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @banishment to; life in 'Akka
